seo.title: Wholesale SEG Light Boxes — Custom Silicone-Edged Graphic Light Boxes | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Custom SEG light boxes and silicone-edged graphic prints for sign shops only. Ultra-thin profiles down to 1" deep, dye-sublimation fabric printing, tool-free graphic changes. Trade pricing, UL listed. 3-week lead time. We never sell retail.

data.subtitle: From experiential retail experiences to advertising and wayfinding content, Sunlite Signs custom-sized Silicone-edged Graphic (SEG) Light Box solutions are like no other the USA industry has experienced — low form factors down to 1" deep, high-resolution printed and illuminated light box signage.
data.image: SEG light box — silicone-edged graphic display, illuminated fabric face, retail environment

blocks.label: Why SEG Light Boxes from Sunlite

data.heading: Why SEG Light Boxes from Sunlite

items.title: Silicone Edge Gasket System
items.description: Precision-sewn silicone gasket around the perimeter of each fabric print locks into the aluminum frame channel for a taut, wrinkle-free illuminated face every time.

items.title: High-Resolution Dye-Sublimation Printing
items.description: Vivid, full-color graphics printed directly into the fabric weave. Dye-sublimation delivers photographic quality that won't crack, peel, or fade like vinyl.

items.title: Tool-Free Graphic Changes
items.description: Swap graphics in minutes with no tools required. Simply pull the silicone gasket from the channel, insert the new print, and push back in. Ideal for seasonal or rotating messaging.

items.title: Ultra-Thin Profiles Down to 1" Deep
items.description: Low-profile aluminum frames as thin as 1" deep. Clean, modern aesthetic that sits nearly flush against walls for sleek interior and exterior installations.

items.title: Fully Custom Sizes
items.description: Every SEG light box is built to your exact dimensions. No standard-size constraints — specify any width and height for a perfect fit in any application.

items.title: UL Listed & LED Illuminated
items.description: All illuminated SEG light boxes are UL listed with complete documentation for code compliance and permitting. Edge-lit or backlit LED configurations available.

data.heading: How the SEG System Works
data.content: The silicone-edged graphic system is the modern standard for changeable illuminated displays. A precision-sewn silicone gasket around the fabric print presses into a recessed channel in the aluminum frame, creating a perfectly tensioned face with no visible hardware. Wholesale to sign companies only.
data.image: SEG light box — close-up of silicone gasket being inserted into aluminum frame channel

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Every SEG light box is engineered for uniform illumination, structural integrity, and effortless graphic changes. Ships ready to install with frame, print, and LED system complete. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: SEG light box — aluminum frame detail with LED modules visible, production facility

specs.label: Face Material
specs.value: Dye-sublimation printed fabric with silicone gasket

specs.label: Sizes
specs.value: Custom sizes — any width and height

specs.label: Frame Finish
specs.value: Anodized aluminum, silver or black standard

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: SEG light boxes bring high-impact illuminated graphics to every environment — from retail storefronts to corporate interiors and trade show floors. Wholesale direct to sign companies for all project types.

data.heading: Ready to Get Started?
data.description: Request a wholesale quote for your next project.
